intended_use: The Swoop Portable MR Imaging System is a portable, ultra-low field magnetic resonance imaging device for producing images that display the internal structure of the head where full diagnostic examina
intended_use_full: The Swoop Portable MR Imaging System is a portable, ultra-low field magnetic resonance imaging device for producing images that display the internal structure of the head where full diagnostic examination is not clinically practical. When interpreted by a trained physician, these images provide information that can be useful in determining a diagnosis.
target_condition: Internal structural abnormalities of the head requiring diagnostic imaging where full diagnostic examination is not clinically practical
ground_truth: NEMA phantom standards and American College of Radiology guidance for image quality assessment
other_metrics: Image quality criteria validation against NEMA MS 1-2008 (R2020), NEMA MS 3-2008 (R2020), NEMA MS 9-2008 (R2020), NEMA MS 12-2016, and ACR phantom test guidance standards; Specific Absorption Rate (SAR) characterization per NEMA MS 8-2016
